title: Marvel Movie Trivia
description: How well do you know the Marvel Cinematic Universe? Test your knowledge of Earth's Mightiest Heroes.

questions.text: Who plays Tony Stark / Iron Man in the MCU?
questions.explanation: Robert Downey Jr. debuted as Tony Stark in Iron Man (2008). His performance helped launch and define the MCU.

questions.text: At the end of Captain America: The First Avenger, who is found frozen in the ice?
questions.explanation: Steve crashes the Valkyrie into the Arctic and is preserved in ice for decades. He wakes up in the modern era.

questions.text: What is the name of Thanos's home planet in Avengers: Infinity War?
questions.explanation: Thanos shows Doctor Strange his ruined homeworld, Titan. He claims its collapse validated his extremist worldview.

questions.text: Captain America's shield is primarily made of which metal in the MCU?
questions.explanation: Howard Stark presents the shield as made from vibranium, a rare Wakandan metal. It absorbs kinetic energy very efficiently.

questions.text: Which film is the first movie released in the MCU?
questions.explanation: Iron Man released in 2008 and introduced Tony Stark and Nick Fury's post-credits appearance. It kicked off the MCU timeline in theaters.

questions.text: Before becoming Vision, what was the name of Tony Stark's AI assistant?
questions.explanation: J.A.R.V.I.S. is Tony's original AI system. Elements of J.A.R.V.I.S. are used in creating Vision in Avengers: Age of Ultron.

questions.text: On which planet is the Soul Stone obtained in Avengers: Infinity War?
questions.explanation: Vormir is the location where a loved one must be sacrificed to claim the Soul Stone. Both Thanos and later Clint/Natasha travel there.

questions.text: What phrase is commonly used in Black Panther as a Wakandan salute?
questions.explanation: Wakanda Forever is the iconic salute and rallying cry throughout Black Panther and later MCU appearances. It symbolizes unity and pride.

questions.text: Who directed Guardians of the Galaxy (2014)?
questions.explanation: James Gunn directed Guardians of the Galaxy and helped define its humor and music-driven style. He also directed Vol. 2 and Vol. 3.

questions.text: What is Doctor Strange's first name?
questions.explanation: Doctor Strange's full name is Stephen Strange. He is introduced as a neurosurgeon in Doctor Strange (2016).

questions.text: Who says 'I am Iron Man' in the climax of Avengers: Endgame?
questions.explanation: Tony Stark delivers the line before using the Infinity Stones to defeat Thanos's army. It mirrors his iconic line from Iron Man (2008).

questions.text: In Spider-Man: No Way Home, who casts the spell that goes wrong and affects the multiverse?
questions.explanation: Doctor Strange begins a memory-altering spell for Peter Parker, but interruptions destabilize it. The result pulls in visitors from other universes.

questions.text: At the start of Avengers: Infinity War, where is the Mind Stone located?
questions.explanation: The Mind Stone is embedded in Vision's forehead after events from Age of Ultron. Thanos seeks it as one of the final stones.

questions.text: What is the name of Thor's axe forged in Avengers: Infinity War?
questions.explanation: Thor forges Stormbreaker on Nidavellir with help from Eitri, Rocket, and Groot. The weapon can summon the Bifrost.

questions.text: Who kills Loki at the beginning of Avengers: Infinity War?
questions.explanation: Thanos kills Loki after Loki attempts to betray him with a dagger. This happens aboard the Asgardian refugee ship.

questions.text: Which realm is key to the Avengers' time-travel plan in Avengers: Endgame?
questions.explanation: The Avengers use the Quantum Realm plus Pym Particles to navigate time. This plan is central to the Time Heist.

questions.text: Who is T'Challa's younger sister in Black Panther?
questions.explanation: Shuri is Wakanda's brilliant princess and chief technologist. She designs many of Black Panther's advanced tools.

questions.text: In Captain Marvel, what is the name of Carol Danvers' Air Force best friend?
questions.explanation: Maria Rambeau is Carol's close friend and fellow pilot. Her daughter Monica later appears in other MCU projects.

questions.text: In Spider-Man: Far From Home, what is Mysterio's real name?
questions.explanation: Mysterio is actually Quentin Beck, a former Stark employee. He uses drones and illusions to fake superheroic threats.

questions.text: What battle cry does Captain America shout while charging in Avengers: Endgame's final battle?
questions.explanation: Captain America finally says 'Avengers, assemble!' in Endgame. It is a long-awaited payoff for MCU fans.
